page.title: Routing
page.lead: Learn how to define routes and handle HTTP requests with SkyguardJS. It provides a simple and intuitive routing system that supports all HTTP methods and dynamic route parameters.

basicRouting.title: Basic routes
basicRouting.description: To define routes, use the different methods on the app object.

routeParameters.title: Routes with parameters
routeParameters.description: To capture request parameters, use the params property of the request object.
routeParameters.tip: Parameters are always returned as strings. Use validation schemas to convert them to other types.

queryParameters.title: Routes with query parameters
queryParameters.description: To access query parameters from requests, use the query property of the request object.

groupRoutes.title: Route groups
groupRoutes.description: Skyguard has a method to create a route group based on an initial prefix.
groupRoutes.note: The group method receives a function. You can create a separate function that receives a <mark class="docs-highlight">RouterGroup</mark> as a parameter.
